item.title: RT by @Dinosn: Lazarus used this as a zero-day. No BYOVD needed. The vulnerable driver is already on every Windows machine. CVE-2024-21338 exploits appid.sys (AppLocker's driver) to call a user-contro
item.description: pLazarus used this as a zero-day. No BYOVD needed. The vulnerable driver is already on every Windows machine.br /br /CVE-2024-21338 exploits appid.sys (AppLocker's driver) to call a user-controlled function pointer in kernel mode. The exploit uses ExpProfileDelete as a valid kCFG target to decrement
